name: Block
effect: Not knocked down on a [[both-down]] result.

name: Dauntless
effect: Roll to match a stronger opponent's Strength for a block.

name: Fend
effect: Opponents can't [[follow-up]] after pushing you back.

name: Frenzy
effect: Must [[follow-up]] and throw a second block if the target was pushed back.

name: Kick
effect: Reduce kick-off deviation to a D3.

name: Pro
effect: Once per activation, roll 3+ to re-roll one die.

name: Steady Footing
effect: Roll a 6 to avoid a knock-down or fall.

name: Strip Ball
effect: A ball carrier you [[push-back]] drops the ball.

name: Sure Hands
effect: Re-roll a failed pick-up; immune to [[strip-ball]].

name: Tackle
effect: Opponents can't use [[dodge]] to leave your [[tackle-zone]].

name: Taunt
effect: Force a player you pushed back to [[follow-up]].

name: Wrestle
effect: On a [[both-down]], put both players [[prone]].

name: Catch
effect: Re-roll a failed catch.

name: Diving Catch
effect: Catch into adjacent squares; +1 to catch in the target square.

name: Diving Tackle
effect: Apply −2 to an opponent's [[dodge]] out of your [[tackle-zone]]; you go [[prone]].

name: Dodge
effect: Once per turn, re-roll a failed dodge.

name: Defensive
effect: Opponents you mark can't use [[guard]] or Put the Boot In during their turn.

name: Hit and Run
effect: After a block or stab, step one free square if still standing.

name: Jump Up
effect: Stand up free; may block while [[prone]] (+1 to the test).

name: Leap
effect: Jump an adjacent square with reduced penalties (minimum −1).

name: Safe Pair of Hands
effect: When knocked down, place the ball in an adjacent square instead of bouncing it.

name: Sidestep
effect: Choose your own [[push-back]] square.

name: Sprint
effect: One extra [[rush]] per move.

name: Sure Feet
effect: Once per turn, re-roll a failed [[rush]].

name: Accurate
effect: +1 on a Quick or Short pass.

name: Cannoneer
effect: +1 on a Long pass or Long Bomb.

name: Cloud Burster
effect: Re-roll a Long Bomb, or deny opponents an interception.

name: Dump-Off
effect: Make a quick pass when targeted by a block.

name: Give and Go
effect: Keep moving after a quick pass or hand-off.

name: Hail Mary Pass
effect: Throw to any square as a Long Bomb; can't be intercepted.

name: Leader
effect: One extra team re-roll while on the pitch at the start of a half.

name: Nerves of Steel
effect: Ignore [[marked|marking]] modifiers when passing or catching.

name: On the Ball
effect: Move up to 3 squares before an opponent's pass resolves.

name: Pass
effect: Re-roll a failed pass.

name: Punt
effect: A special action to kick the ball downfield.

name: Safe Pass
effect: A natural 1 on a pass keeps the ball — no [[turnover]].

name: Arm Bar
effect: +1 to armour/injury if an opponent falls [[dodge|dodging]] from your [[tackle-zone]].

name: Brawler
effect: Re-roll a single [[both-down]] when blocking.

name: Break Tackle
effect: +1/+2/+3 to a dodge, scaling with your Strength.

name: Bullseye
effect: Throw Team-mate lands on target with no scatter.

name: Grab
effect: Choose the opponent's [[push-back]] square; they can't [[sidestep]].

name: Guard
effect: Give [[assist|assists]] even while [[marked]].

name: Juggernaut
effect: On a [[blitz]], treat [[both-down]] as a push; ignore [[fend]], [[stand-firm]] and [[wrestle]].

name: Mighty Blow
effect: +1 to armour/injury when you knock a player down.

name: Multiple Block
effect: Block two opponents at once (−2 ST).

name: Stand Firm
effect: Don't get [[push-back|pushed back]].

name: Strong Arm
effect: +1 to Throw Team-mate.

name: Thick Skull
effect: Only knocked out on 9+ (8+ if [[stunty]]).

name: Dirty Player
effect: +1 to the Armour or Injury roll when you [[foul]].

name: Eye Gouge
effect: An opponent you [[push-back]] can't give [[assist|assists]].

name: Fumblerooski
effect: Drop the ball on the ground mid-move without a [[turnover]].

name: Lethal Flight
effect: +1 to armour/injury when a thrown player knocks an opponent down.

name: Lone Fouler
effect: Re-roll a failed Armour roll when you [[foul]] with no [[assist|assists]].

name: Pile Driver
effect: After a knock-down from a block, make a free [[foul]].

name: Put the Boot In
effect: Give offensive [[assist|assists]] to a [[foul]] even while [[marked]].

name: Quick Foul
effect: Keep moving after you [[foul]].

name: Saboteur
effect: When you go down on a block, the opponent is [[knocked-down]] too.

name: Shadowing
effect: On a 4+, follow an opponent who leaves your [[tackle-zone]] into their old square.

name: Sneaky Git
effect: Not sent off for doubles when [[foul|fouling]], unless armour breaks.

name: Violent Innovator
effect: Earn SPP for casualties from your special actions.

name: Big Hand
effect: Ignore all penalties when picking up the ball.

name: Claws
effect: Break armour on an 8+ regardless of AV.

name: Disturbing Presence
effect: −1 to enemy pass, catch or intercept per such player within 3 squares.

name: Extra Arms
effect: +1 to catch, pick up or intercept.

name: Foul Appearance
effect: An attacker rolls first; on a 1 the action targeting you fails.

name: Horns
effect: +1 ST on a [[blitz]] block.

name: Iron Hard Skin
effect: Opponents can't modify armour rolls against you; immune to [[claws]].

name: Monstrous Mouth
effect: Pin a [[marked]] standing opponent so they can't leave.

name: Prehensile Tail
effect: Extra −1 to opponents [[dodge|dodging]] out of your [[tackle-zone]].

name: Tentacles
effect: Roll D6 + ST vs their ST; 6+ stops them leaving.

name: Two Heads
effect: +1 to dodge.

name: Very Long Legs
effect: +1 to leap or jump, +2 to intercept; ignore [[cloud-burster]].

name: Always Hungry
effect: Risk eating the team-mate you throw.

name: Animal Savagery
effect: May knock down your own adjacent team-mate after acting.

name: Animosity (X)
effect: May refuse to pass or hand-off to a named team-mate.

name: Ball & Chain
effect: Moves randomly via template, hitting everything in its path.

name: Bloodlust (X+)
effect: Must feed on a Thrall after acting, or cause a [[turnover]].

name: Bombardier
effect: Throw a bomb (like a pass) that knocks down on a hit.

name: Bone Head
effect: May become [[distracted]] after acting (a 1).

name: Breathe Fire
effect: A special attack on a [[marked]] opponent.

name: Chainsaw
effect: A special attack with a +3 armour roll; a 1 hits yourself.

name: Decay
effect: +1 to [[casualty]] rolls made against you.

name: Drunkard
effect: −1 to [[rush]].

name: Hatred (X)
effect: Re-roll a Player Down result when blocking a named opponent.

name: Hypnotic Gaze
effect: Make an adjacent opponent [[distracted]].

name: Insignificant
effect: Can't outnumber your non-insignificant players.

name: Kick Team-Mate
effect: Throw a team-mate as an attack (once per turn).

name: Loner (X+)
effect: Roll X+ to use a team re-roll, or lose it.

name: My Ball
effect: Won't voluntarily give up the ball.

name: No Ball
effect: Can't carry the ball; auto-fails catch, pick-up or intercept.

name: Pick-Me-Up
effect: Nearby [[prone]] team-mates may stand free at the opponent's turn end.

name: Plague Ridden
effect: Once a game, raise a new lineman from a kill.

name: Pogo
effect: Jump an adjacent square ignoring jump penalties.

name: Projectile Vomit
effect: A special attack on an adjacent opponent.

name: Really Stupid
effect: Likely to become [[distracted]] unless team-mates are near.

name: Regeneration
effect: 4+ to shrug off a [[casualty]] (to Reserves).

name: Right Stuff
effect: Can be thrown (Throw Team-mate), even while [[prone]].

name: Secret Weapon
effect: Sent off at the end of the drive it played in.

name: Stab
effect: A special attack with an unmodifiable armour roll.

name: Stunty
effect: No [[marked|marking]] penalty when dodging; −1 to intercept; uses the Stunty injury table.

name: Swoop
effect: When thrown, glide (no scatter) and re-roll the landing.

name: Take Root
effect: May become rooted (stuck) after acting (a 1).

name: Throw Team-Mate
effect: May throw a team-mate who has [[right-stuff]].

name: Timmm-Ber!
effect: Adjacent team-mates help a low-MA player stand (+1 each).

name: Titchy
effect: +1 to dodge; adds no [[marked|marking]] penalty to opponents.

name: Trickster
effect: When targeted, slip to an adjacent square before the action resolves.

name: Unchannelled Fury
effect: May rage and waste its activation (a 1–3).

name: Unsteady
effect: Can't use the Secure the Ball action.
